This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-8j37-5w68-wj2g. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.7 contains a sender policy bypass vulnerability in BlueBubbles that allows participants to match allowlist entries through conversation metadata rather than stable sender identity. Attackers can influence conversation-level identifiers to receive agent responses intended for configured senders, potentially bypassing access controls.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8hj2-w4c9-fjfq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:32:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8hj2-w4c9-fjfq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8hj2-w4c9-fjfq"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:32:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-8j37-5w68-wj2g", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53860", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-sender-policy-bypass-via-mutable-conversation-identifiers-in-bluebubbles", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8hj2-w4c9-fjfq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: BlueBubbles sender policy could match mutable conversation identifiers", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:32:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8hj2-w4c9-fjfq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.5.6"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:32:05Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: BlueBubbles sender policy could match mutable conversation identifiers
